summary: Three batches of data are required for neural network training: one for training, one for testing, and one for validation.
The training and test sets are used during the training process while the validation set remains untouched for hyperparameter tuning.
The default split between training:test:validation batches is 80:10:10.
The validation_split argument allows definition of the size of test and validation sets.
The validation_split argument should not exceed 0.2 to ensure at least 60% of data is left for training.
The normalise_class argument ensures every class has the same number of peaks for training.
When normalise_class is set to True, the number of peaks for each class equals the smallest class.
